inputs.label: Power Rating
inputs.businessContext: Rated power consumption of a single device in watts.

businessContext_i18n.en: Rated power consumption of a single device in watts.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek bir cihazın watt cinsinden anma güç tüketimi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Nennleistungsaufnahme eines einzelnen Geräts in Watt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Consommation nominale d'un seul appareil en watts.
businessContext_i18n.es: Consumo nominal de un solo dispositivo en vatios.
businessContext_i18n.ar: استهلاك الطاقة المقنن لجهاز واحد بالواط.

inputs.label: Number of Devices
inputs.businessContext: Number of identical devices operating concurrently.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of identical devices operating concurrently.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der gleichzeitig betriebenen identischen Geräte.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de dispositivos idénticos operando simultáneamente.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد الأجهزة المتطابقة التي تعمل في وقت واحد.

inputs.label: Usage Hours per Day
inputs.businessContext: Average daily operating hours of the device(s).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average daily operating hours of the device(s).
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche tägliche Betriebsstunden des Geräts/der Geräte.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Heures de fonctionnement quotidiennes moyennes du ou des appareils.
businessContext_i18n.es: Horas diarias promedio de funcionamiento del dispositivo(s).

inputs.label: Days per Month
inputs.businessContext: Number of operating days per month, typically 30 for estimation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of operating days per month, typically 30 for estimation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aylık çalışma günü sayısı, tahmin için genellikle 30.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Betriebstage pro Monat, typischerweise 30 für eine Schätzung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de jours de fonctionnement par mois, généralement 30 pour une estimation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de días operativos por mes, típicamente 30 para estimación.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد أيام التشغيل في الشهر، عادة 30 للتقدير.

inputs.label: Electricity Rate
inputs.businessContext: Cost per kilowatt-hour in euros (adjust to local currency).

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost per kilowatt-hour in euros (adjust to local currency).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kilovatsaat başına euro cinsinden maliyet (yerel para birimine göre ayarlayın).
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten pro Kilowattstunde in Euro (an lokale Währung anpassen).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût par kilowattheure en euros (ajuster selon la devise locale).
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste por kilovatio-hora en euros (ajustar a moneda local).
businessContext_i18n.ar: التكلفة لكل كيلوواط ساعة باليورو (اضبط حسب العملة المحلية).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
